title: Remove admin/edit overlay panel (CustomizationPrompt) from the site

requirements.text: Fully remove the CustomizationPrompt component and all references to it from the codebase. Delete the file frontend/src/components/CustomizationPrompt.tsx and remove its import, state management (the 800ms auto-display timer), and rendering from frontend/src/App.tsx so the overlay never appears for any visitor on any device.

quotes: it popes up right above all the task i want it to be fully removed as i will not needing it

acceptanceCriteria: The 'What would you like to change?' dialog/overlay no longer appears on page load or at any point during site navigation.
CustomizationPrompt.tsx is deleted or no longer referenced anywhere in the project.
No auto-display timer (setTimeout/800ms) for the overlay remains in App.tsx.
The site renders normally without any admin panel for all visitors across all devices.

constraints: Do not modify any immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components).
Do not alter any other visible site sections — only remove the CustomizationPrompt overlay.
nonGoals: Changing any other component styling or content.
